title: Death Knights (RPG Series)
description: ☠️ Embrace darkness and become a Death Knight using Unholy, Blood and Frost magic.
body:
## ☠️ Become a deathbringer using blood, unholy and frost magic. [![Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Loader-Fabric-ecebe6?labelColor=263768&style=for-the-badge)](https://legacy.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://fabricmc.net/) [![Connector](https://img.shields.io/badge/Forge-via_Sinytra_Connector-orange?style=for-the-badge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/sinytra-connector) [![Discord](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512.svg?label=&logo=discord&logoColor=ffffff&color=7389D8&labelColor=6A7EC2&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/lunapixel) ![Environment: Client](https://img.shields.io/badge/CLIENT%20SIDE%20INSTALLATION-REQUIRED-ecebe6?labelColor=263768&style=for-the-badge) ![Environment: Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/SERVER%20SIDE%20INSTALLATION-REQUIRED-ecebe6?labelColor=263768&style=for-the-badge)

--- ## ✨ Discover more of the RPG Series [![Archers](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/169/archers_full_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/archers) [![Paladins](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/170/paladins_full_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paladins-and-priests) [![Wizards](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/755/171/wizards_full_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wizards) [![Rogues](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/899/332/rogues_full_bg_275.png)](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rogues-and-warriors) [![Jewelry](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/760/387/jewelry_full_275.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jewelry) **As of Beta 0.3.0, only Frost Death Knight abilities are included in the mod. Blood and Unholy will be coming out soon, as this mod follows the same update cycle as [Prominence II RPG Hasturian Era](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/prominence-2-rpg)!** ## 📦 Installation ### Required - [Necronomicon API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/necronomicon) - [AzureLib Armor](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/azurelib-armor) - [Runes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/rune-crafting) - [Spell Engine](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spell-engine) ### Strongly recommended - [Better Combat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/better-combat-by-daedelus) for proper weapon mechanics ## ✨ Features ## Getting Started ![Getting Started](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/main/desc/death_knights/getting-started.png?raw=true) Create a Spell Binding Table to turn a book into one of the skill books. Add bookshelves around it similar to an enchanting table to bind skills to your skill books, unlocking abilities for your Death Knight specialization. ## Runecarving ![Runecarving](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/main/desc/death_knights/runecarving.png?raw=true) Each Death Knight has their own rune type, being Blood, Unholy or Frost. These runes can be carved inside weapons to transform them into Runic Weaponry. To do so, you can craft a Runecarved Stone, which allows you to fuse those runes into a weapon. ## Death Knight Armors ![Death Knight Armors](https://github.com/nvb-uy/cdn/blob/main/desc/death_knights/Armors.png?raw=true) Create the Death's Call armor set and upgrade it to one of the three variants: Plaguebringer for Unholy, Frozen Champion for Frost, or Crimson Guard for Blood. ## 🤝 Integrations - ✅ Better Combat - ✅ Jewelry - Death Knight Jewelry - 🏗️ Simply Swords - Runic Weapon Compatibility ## 🏗️ Roadmap - Blood Death Knight Abilities (v0.5.0) ## 📚 Credits - [Mim1q](https://www.curseforge.com/members/mim1q/projects) for making the textures & models of most items. - **Inkgum** for making the models and textures of the spec-specific armor sets. - [Daedelus](https://www.curseforge.com/members/daedelus_dev/projects) for providing the Blood Rune texture, and making Spell Engine & RPG Series, inspiring this mod. - [Blizzard for making the Warcraft series that created the Death Knights](https://wowpedia.fandom.com/wiki/Death_knight), which is what this mod is about. - [Roost_er](https://www.curseforge.com/members/cleannrooster/projects) for inspiring some of the skill casting style, from their mod [Spellblades and Such](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/spellblade-next).
